headline: Does JPMorgan’s Input Cost Upgrade Shift the Bull Case for Eastman Chemical’s Earnings Power (EMN)?
summary: Earlier in April 2026, JPMorgan upgraded Eastman Chemical to Overweight and highlighted an improved earnings outlook supported by more favorable commodity price trends. This shift in analyst stance underscores how changing input cost expectations may influence views on Eastman’s earnings resilience and cash generation potential. Next, we’ll examine how JPMorgan’s more positive EBITDA outlook interacts with Eastman’s existing investment narrative built around cost savings. Capitalize on the...
